clinical_blockers: The legacy workflow does not enforce the adult, more-than-8-week, age, smoking, or telehealth qualifiers of the exact sources.

Voice change or stridor, persistent localized abnormality, oxygen saturation, respiratory rate, previous-investigation review, generic clinician plans, inhaled-therapy trials, fixed follow-up, PRN wording, and some generic safety-netting remain unsupported.
Diagnosis, cancer-risk interpretation, investigation selection, treatment, urgency, and qualified clinician review remain clinician responsibilities.
